name: Duke Boys Auto Sales

Homepage and /auto-sales page link to autofind.com/dealer/listing/155754 (stale external link, returns 'Results 1 to 0 of 0' — dead/empty). CarGurus dealer page (cargurus.com/Cars/m-Duke-Boys-Auto-Sales-sp341830) confirmed 0 vehicles listed. AutosToday shows 0 inventory. No JSON-LD, no __NEXT_DATA__, no API surface found. Duke Boys is primarily an auto repair and towing shop that also sells a small number of vehicles, but maintains no active online inventory listing on any platform.
